classification.loc_class: QC - Physics: plasma and electromagnetic fields

theory.canonical_statement: ID5745 records Classical Quantum Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\topological_quantum_storage_paper.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: \begin{align} \mathcal{H}_{classical} &= \int_V \mathbf{A} \cdot \mathbf{B} \, d^3r \\ \mathcal{H}_{rotating} &= -\frac{\omega_{gyro}}{c^2}\int_V \mathbf{r} \times (\mathbf{E} \times \mathbf{B}) \, d^3r \\ \mathcal{H}_{quantum} &= \sum_n n \langle n_{flux} \rangle \frac{\hbar}{2e} \\ \mathcal{H}_{photon} &= \int d^3k \, \hbar\omega_k(n_{L,k} - n_{R,k}) \end{align}
canonical_equation.source_section_latex: \begin{align} \mathcal{H}_{classical} &= \int_V \mathbf{A} \cdot \mathbf{B} \, d^3r \\ \mathcal{H}_{rotating} &= -\frac{\omega_{gyro}}{c^2}\int_V \mathbf{r} \times (\mathbf{E} \times \mathbf{B}) \, d^3r \\ \mathcal{H}_{quantum} &= \sum_n n \langle n_{flux} \rangle \frac{\hbar}{2e} \\ \mathcal{H}_{photon} &= \int d^3k \, \hbar\omega_k(n_{L,k} - n_{R,k}) \end{align}
